svg.title: Rush Duel Card Frame
svg.desc: Skeleton structure. Canvas: 1180 x 1720 px, SVG top-left origin.

polyline.title: Art box
polyline.desc: Top-right notched for attribute circle. Square L=62 T=176 R=1118 B=1232 W=1056 H=1056 without right-top corner. Distance from art box square edges to inner card boundary: 22px. Path: left-top → right-top (pre notch) ↘ notch inward point → right-top ↓ right-bot ← left-bot ↑ left-top

rect.title: Effect box outer
rect.desc: Aligned to art. L=62 T=1232 R=1118 B=1614

polyline.title: Effect box inner
polyline.desc: Distance of 8px from the outer box on all sides. The pre notch point mirrors the art notch inward point horizontally. left-top ↓ left-bot → right-bot ↑ right-top ← pre notch ↙ notch inward point ← left-top

polyline.title: Footer
polyline.desc: Place for Creator (left) and set code (right). Footer top edge = bottom of effect box outer. Distance from edges to inner card boundary: 22px, matching the art box. left-top → right-top ↓ right-bot ← notch-right ↖ notch-up ← notch-up ↙ notch-left ← left-bot ↑ left-top

polyline.title: Bottom logo
polyline.desc: RUSH DUEL. left-bot → right-bot ↖ right-top ← left-top ↙ left-bot
